ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the university's official website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the university */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the university */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, research) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Endowment amount in millions */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* References the university being ranked */,
  "overall_rank" REAL /* Overall rank of the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "ranking_system" TEXT /* Name of the ranking system (e.g., QS, THE, ARWU) */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous year */,
  "rank_category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., global, national, regional) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* References the year of the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* References the university for its performance metrics */,
  "teaching_score" REAL /* Score representing teaching quality */,
  "research_score" REAL /* Score representing research output */,
  "citations_score" REAL /* Score representing citation impact */,
  "industry_income_score" REAL /* Score representing industry income */,
  "international_outlook_score" REAL /* Score representing international outlook */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* References the year of the metrics */,
  "research_grants" REAL /* Total research grants in millions */,
  "patents" INTEGER /* Number of patents filed */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "female_students" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "male_students" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "student_satisfaction" REAL /* Student satisfaction score (0-100) */,
  "graduate_employment_rate" REAL /* Graduate employment rate percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cwur_rankings" (
  "cwur_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CWUR ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* References the university for its CWUR rankings */,
  "cwur_world_rank" INTEGER /* World rank of the university according to CWUR */,
  "cwur_national_rank" INTEGER /* National rank of the university according to CWUR */,
  "quality_of_education" REAL /* Quality of education score */,
  "alumni_employment" REAL /* Alumni employment score */,
  "quality_of_faculty" REAL /* Quality of faculty score */,
  "research_performance" REAL /* Research performance score */,
  "publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications */,
  "influence" INTEGER /* Influence score */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Citations score */,
  "broad_impact" INTEGER /* Broad impact score */,
  "patents" INTEGER /* Patents score */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* References the year of the ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cwur_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cwur_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cwur_rankings_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sha_rankings" (
  "sha_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SHA ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* References the university for its SHA rankings */,
  "sha_world_rank" INTEGER /* World rank of the university according to SHA */,
  "sha_national_rank" INTEGER /* National rank of the university according to SHA */,
  "sha_score" REAL /* Overall score according to SHA */,
  "sha_score_alumni" REAL /* Score on alumni according to SHA */,
  "sha_score_award" REAL /* Score on awards according to SHA */,
  "sha_score_hici" REAL /* Score on HiCi according to SHA */,
  "sha_score_ns" REAL /* Score on N&S according to SHA */,
  "sha_score_pub" REAL /* Score on publications according to SHA */,
  "sha_score_pcp" REAL /* Score on PCP according to SHA */,
  "sha_year" INTEGER /* Year of the SHA ranking */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* References the year of the ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sha_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sha_rankings_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sha_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in billions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the year (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* References the university for its location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* References the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the university location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the university location */,
  "campus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the campus in square meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* References the university for its faculty metrics */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty at the university */,
  "faculty_with_phd" INTEGER /* Number of faculty with PhDs */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to faculty */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* References the year of the metrics */,
  "total_male_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of male faculty members */,
  "total_female_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of female faculty members */,
  "percentage_phd" REAL /* Percentage of faculty with PhDs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni_employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* References the university for its alumni employment metrics */,
  "employed_alumni" INTEGER /* Number of employed alumni */,
  "unemployed_alumni" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed alumni */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate percentage */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* References the year of the metrics */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of employed alumni */,
  "top_employers" TEXT /* List of top employers of alumni */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_employment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_employment_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
